message:
chore: Update workspace dependencies and beads issue tracker

- Sync Cargo.lock with workspace dependency changes
- Update root Cargo.toml workspace configuration
- Sync beads issue tracker state for multi-agent coordination

This commit captures workspace-level changes that accompany the
feature additions across fcp-cli, fcp-conformance, fcp-sandbox,
fcp-testkit, and fcp-ratelimit crates.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1716,6 +1716,7 @@ name = "fcp-conformance"
 version = "0.1.0"
 dependencies = [
  "chrono",
+ "clap",
  "fcp-cbor",
  "fcp-core",
  "fcp-crypto",
@@ -1835,6 +1836,7 @@ dependencies = [
  "fcp-conformance",
  "fcp-core",
  "fcp-e2e",
+ "fcp-testkit",
  "semver",
  "serde",
  "serde_json",
@@ -2047,6 +2049,7 @@ dependencies = [
  "thiserror 2.0.17",
  "tokio",
  "tracing",
+ "tracing-subscriber",
  "url",
  "wasmtime",
  "wasmtime-wasi",
@@ -2190,6 +2193,7 @@ dependencies = [
  "fcp-conformance",
  "fcp-core",
  "futures-util",
+ "regex",
  "reqwest",
  "serde",
  "serde_json",

@@ -129,6 +129,10 @@ tokio-stream = "0.1"
 wiremock = "0.6"
 pretty_assertions = "1.4"
 jsonschema = "0.29"
+regex = "1.11"
+
+# CLI
+clap = { version = "4.5", features = ["derive"] }
 
 # Supply-chain hardening
 tough = { version = "0.21.0", features = ["http"] }
